upasargachandrika.example_text: 'uttAnenEva hastena prokzaRaM samudAhftam nyaYcatA'ByukzaRaM proktaM tiraScA'vokzaRaM matam' (gf॰saM॰BAzye 1.103)..
'taM yajYaM barhizi prOkzan' (f॰10.90.7) trirevAgniM prokzati triH paryukzati (kO॰sU॰)
'vAcyaliNgAH pramItopasampannaprokzitA hate' (amare 2726) prokzaRaM lakzaRayA vaDa ucyate prokzya hi yajYe paSurhanyata iti svAmI

'udDate vA avokzite'gnimAdaDati' (Sa0 brA0 64418) ukzateH prayoge'BiprAvAnAmupasargARAM vizayanEyatyaM purAtanEruktam-uttAnena hastena prokzaRaM parikIrtitam nyaYcatAByukzaRaM proktaM tiraScAvokzaRaM smftam..
'kiM srucyapa AnIya nirOkzIH' (Sa0 brA0 11534) niHSezamasica ityarTaH
'tAM diSaM nirukzati yasyAmasya dvezyo Bavati' (bO0 Da0 2585) nirukzati=aByukzati
'yadizwa-rUparasaganDasparSaM prokzitamaByukzita ca tacCuci' sAmAnyena jalena DOtamaByukzitamiti SrOtapadArTanirRayaH
'prokzitA'ByukzitAH sOmyAH' (BA0 anu0 9834) prokzaRAByukzaRAvokzaRAnItTaM viviYcanti kovidAH--uttAnenEva hastena prokzaRaM parikIrtitam nyaYcatAByukzaRaM proktaM tiraScAvokzaRaM smftam..
'triH (agnIn) paryukzati' (go0 brA0 pU0 114) paryukzati parita ukzati aBiziYcati
